name: 2048 Flappy
description: Get ready for the ultimate mashup of two legendary hits! Flappy 2048 combines the addictive, flapping mechanics of the bird genre with the brain-teasing math of the 2048 puzzle. In this game, you dont just fly through pipes, you fly through numbers! Tap to flap your tile and navigate through the gaps. To increase your value, you must pass through the walls with numbers that match your own. Watch your tile evolve from 2 to 4, 8, 16, and eventually all the way to 2048 and other! It’s a test of both reflexes and quick thinking. One wrong move or a mistimed flap and it’s game over. How far can you fly, and can you reach the ultimate 2048 tile
instructions: Mouse click or tap to play Desktop Left-Click or Spacebar to flap and fly upwards Mobile Tap the screen to flap and fly upwards Objective Fly through the matching number gates to merge and increase your score Avoid hitting the edges of the gates
